name: LaShelle Chen
about: 3 years in elevated contemporary at Sezane and ME+EM. Known for her product knowledge around quality fabrics and timeless style. Retailers note her appeal with discerning professional shoppers.
interviewTranscript: I have worked in the customer support and retail spaces for over 10 years. I bring organization, attention to detail, a vibrant and positive attitude. I'm very flexible. Pretty handy as well. I can lift heavy things. I get things done in an efficient time frame. I show up on time. I go above and beyond. And I am sure to return to do work as other opportunities arise. I think one of my favorite things about working in retail is the fact that you get to work in a client facing role. I'm really great with people. A time where I have been in a difficult situation in retail—I used to work for a shoe store. And there are times where you have to do returns and maybe the return window is out of its window. And being able to navigate those conversations, which can be difficult not only for the employee, but also for the customer and just letting them know, like, hey, you know, we have these policies for these reasons and just kind of being very open, transparent and kind. I find that it's easier to deescalate those situations.
